commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A focused automated repair can replace the raw manifest stat/read path with guarded regular-file helpers and add coverage without a product decision.; Needs attention: The diff is local-filesystem only, but the exported manifest helper has a concrete symlink/TOCTOU final-read concern.; Review finding: [P1] Guard manifest reads against symlink swaps — packages/memory-host-sdk/src/host/continuity.ts:635-651 (sha=db85d2fdffd65c0f87cb7abef671416fce2743cc)
commands.review_summary:
Adds local continuity snapshot parsing, rendering, manifest formatting, material-change comparison, guarded recent snapshot reads, tests, and runtime-files exports in the memory host SDK.

PR surface: Source +751, Tests +356. Total +1107 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection for the review finding: `buildContinuityManifest` reads selected paths with `fs.stat`/`fs.open` after enumeration instead of the guarded regular-file helpers used by existing memory reads. I did not run a live race repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A focused automated repair can replace the raw manifest stat/read path with guarded regular-file helpers and add coverage without a product decision.
